articles.title: Tripura Govt decides to close all schools due to heatwave conditions - News On AIR
articles.search_term: (heatwave OR "heat wave" OR "severe heatwave" OR "extreme heat" OR "heat spell" OR "scorching heat" OR "blistering heat" OR "sweltering heat" OR "hot winds" OR loo OR "hot loo winds" OR "intense heat" OR "unbearable heat" OR "deadly heat" OR heat OR "weather forecast" OR "weather update" OR "weather alert" OR "IMD forecast" OR "IMD prediction" OR "IMD alert" OR IMD OR "rising temperatures" OR "temperatures expected to rise" OR "relief from heat" OR "respite from heat" OR "heat respite" OR "respite from scorching heat") Tripura
articles.full_text:
In Tripura, prevailing heatwave conditions, the state government has decided to close all the schools for next four days.
According to a press statement issued by Education (School) Secretary, N.C. Sharma, all government, government aided, schools under TTAADC and privately managed schools will remain closed from April 24-27 in the state.
In another, press communique, the state revenue department has said that the medical fraternity has asked people to avoid exposure to the blazing sun and heat which might in worst case lead to sun strokes.
The district administrations have been advised to activate the emergency operation centres, keep alerting the quick response teams and resources, ensuring uninterrupted power supply to all areas and taking support from other key agencies.
